problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: If Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing is applied to be, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
